confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.title: Latest L2 readBurst hit ready/valid deadlock candidate
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.trigger: Same-address readBurst miss/refill followed by readBurst hit while L1 resp_ready is low.
confirmed_or_candidate_bug_points.verification: Latest-upstream formal assert/cover plus executable ready/valid coverage closure.

ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.title: Flush while a miss is outstanding may expose stale-response bugs
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.trigger: Issue a read miss, hold memory response, assert flush, then release memory response.
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.verification: Manual Verilog testbench drives the trigger and the VCD shows the cancelled response is dropped; not upgraded to candidate bug.

ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.title: Dirty eviction writeback/refill ordering is a high-risk replacement corner
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.trigger: Dirty a line, force conflict replacement, and observe whether writeback precedes refill.
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.verification: Manual Verilog waveform shows writeback is visible with the replacement refill; not upgraded to candidate bug.

ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.title: Partial write masks can corrupt untouched bytes
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.trigger: Write alternating byte masks to a cached word and read back the untouched lanes.
ucagent_suggested_hypotheses.verification: Manual Verilog waveform shows disabled byte lanes are preserved; not upgraded to candidate bug.
